title: Garlicky Fluffy Turkish Meat Kofte
description: A flavorful and nutritious Turkish dish made with ground meat, onions, and spices, served in a steamed leaf wrap. This recipe is perfect for meal prep or a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: Ground lamb or beef
ingredients.notes: Choose a lean meat for a healthier option

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Finely chop the onion for best results

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free breadcrumbs for a gluten-free option

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: Use a large egg for binding the kofte

ingredients.name: Cumin
ingredients.notes: Use ground cumin for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: Use sweet paprika for a milder flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Clotted cream
ingredients.notes: Use as a topping for added richness

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Use as a garnish for added freshness

ingredients.name: Lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Use as a marinade for added flavor

instructions: Mix the ground meat, onion, garlic, breadcrumbs, egg, cumin, paprika, and salt in a large bowl.
Use your hands to mix the ingredients until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Preheat a steamer basket in a large pot of boiling water.
Thread the kofte onto skewers, leaving a little space between each one.
Steam the kofte for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the kofte in a steamed leaf wrap with clotted cream, fresh parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
